name: io.github.AKzar1el/mcp-web-validator
title: Web Validator & SEO Audit
description: W3C HTML/CSS Validator, schema/JSON-LD checker, and Technical SEO Audit MCP Server.

tools.name: validate_local_html
tools.description: Validates a local HTML file against the official W3C Nu HTML Checker API. Catches syntax, tags, and compliance errors.

filePath.description: Absolute or relative path to the local HTML file.

tools.name: validate_url
tools.description: Validates the markup of a live public URL using the W3C HTML validation engine.

url.description: The live URL to validate (must start with http:// or https://).

tools.name: validate_local_css
tools.description: Validates a local CSS file against the W3C Jigsaw CSS Validator API. Finds styling syntax errors.

filePath.description: Absolute or relative path to the local CSS file.

tools.name: audit_seo_metadata
tools.description: Runs a fast offline audit of HTML metadata, heading structure, viewport responsive tags, image alt tags, and Open Graph cards.

htmlContent.description: The raw HTML string content to analyze.

tools.name: check_broken_links
tools.description: Extracts all links (a href tags) in the HTML content and tests their HTTP status codes to detect broken internal or external URLs.

htmlContent.description: The raw HTML string content to inspect.

baseUrl.description: Optional base URL to resolve relative paths (e.g., https://example.com).

tools.name: validate_schema_markup
tools.description: Finds and validates the JSON-LD schema blocks within the HTML, catching syntax issues.

htmlContent.description: The raw HTML containing <script type="application/ld+json"> blocks.

tools.name: generate_validation_report
tools.description: Runs all validation checks (HTML, CSS, SEO, Schema, Links) on local files and aggregates them into a beautifully formatted Markdown report with summary tables.

htmlFilePath.description: Absolute or relative path to the local HTML file to validate.

cssFilePath.description: Optional absolute or relative path to the local CSS file to validate.

baseUrl.description: Optional base URL to resolve relative link paths.

tools.name: capture_screenshots
tools.description: Renders a local HTML file or remote URL using Puppeteer and captures screenshots at different viewport sizes (desktop, tablet, mobile).

targetPath.description: Path to the local HTML file or remote URL (e.g. http:// or https://) to screenshot.

outputDir.description: Optional absolute or relative directory path where screenshots will be saved. Defaults to '.mcp-validator/screenshots'.

viewports.description: Optional list of custom viewports to capture. Each viewport object must have name, width, and height.
